validation_result.test_text: I feel completely overwhelmed and cannot keep up with everything.
validation_result.interpretation: energy_dissipation 3.13/10 is the dominant threat signal — highest-confidence threat, consistent with §17 finding on calibration artifacts

integration_notes.psq_lite_note: Inferred from machine-response-v3-spec.md limitations block exclusion list — not yet a canonical spec. Confirm before implementing PSQ-Lite triage in Item 4 UI.
integration_notes.action_gate_behavior: Composite gate opens when ≥1 dimension meets r-based confidence threshold (r≥0.6). Currently ~7–9 dims pass per typical text.
integration_notes.hierarchy_field: Use for hierarchical display in Item 4 UI — factors_2/3/5 + g_psq available in every response without additional computation
